---
pagetitle: About | Yueswater Blog
lang: en
title: "About"
description: "I'm Anthony (宋品岳), a graduate student at NCCU and software intern. This blog documents my work in Python, R, LaTeX, and full-stack development."
image: images/profile.JPG
about:
  template: trestles
  links:
    - icon: github
      href: https://github.com/yueswater
    - icon: facebook
      href: https://www.facebook.com/yueswater/
    - icon: instagram
      href: https://instagram.com/yues_19_water
    - icon: threads-fill
      href: https://www.threads.com/@yues_19_water
---

## Hi, I'm Anthony 👋

My full name is **Pin Yue Sung**, but feel free to call me **Anthony**. I'm a student at [National Chengchi University (NCCU)](https://www.nccu.edu.tw/index.php?Lang=en), majoring in **International Business** — and yes, I somehow ended up deep in the world of software along the way.

Alongside my studies, I work as a **software intern** at a tech company, where I get to turn caffeine and curiosity into actual products.

## What I Build

I work across the full stack — from backend APIs to mobile apps. Here's what I reach for most often:

- **Backend:** Python with [FastAPI](https://fastapi.tiangolo.com/), [Django](https://www.djangoproject.com/), and [Flask](https://flask.palletsprojects.com/); also [Node.js](https://nodejs.org/)
- **Frontend:** [React](https://react.dev/) and [Next.js](https://nextjs.org/)
- **Mobile:** [Flutter](https://flutter.dev/)
- **Data & analysis:** **R** and Python

## What This Blog Is About

This is a space for **tutorials and technical writing**, focused on topics I genuinely use and care about:

- **Python** — from scripting to building full web applications
- **R** — data analysis, visualization, and statistical thinking
- **LaTeX** — because good typesetting matters

The goal is simple: write the guides I wish I had when I was learning. If something here saves you a few hours of frustration, that's a win.

> *Stay curious.*

## Beyond the Screen

When I'm not coding, I'm probably in the kitchen experimenting with **Chinese cuisine** — the kind of cooking that takes patience and rewards it. Food, to me, is its own kind of creative problem-solving.

Music-wise, I'm a dedicated **EDM** listener. My taste leans toward **Trance** and **House**, and [Avicii](https://avicii.com/) remains my all-time favorite — his music is proof that something digital can still feel deeply human.
